EmailTemplate.name: Exhibition Internal Registration Approved SMS
EmailTemplate.subject: 展会报名成功
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
尊敬的 {!Internal_Registration__c.Name_CN__c}，
您的报名已通过公司审核。第137届广交会将于4月15日至19日开展，请尽快登录【信鸿-应用程序-国际营销展会系统】填报航班/酒店/班车需求。预祝参展顺利，谢谢！
Dear {!Internal_Registration__c.Name_CN__c}，
Your registration has been approved by the company. The 137th Canton Fair will be held from April 15th to 19th, please log in to HiChat -App Center-International Expo Management System as soon as possible to fill in the flight/hotel/shuttle bus demand. Wishing you all the best in the Fair, thank you!
登陆遇到问题咨询 崔杰 cuijie3@hisense.com,王芳 wangfang19@hisense.com
